title: Networks, Queues, Simulation, and Operations Research · Error Forensics
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving routing, queues, and allocation. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a reproducible operations research computational study and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate network flow in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive integer programming in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute queueing models in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Recalculate the repaired case
steps.instruction: 28 records meet rule A, 21 meet rule B, and 10 meet both. How many meet A or B?
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use inclusion-exclusion: |A ∪ B| = |A| + |B| − |A ∩ B|.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Use inclusion-exclusion: |A ∪ B| = |A| + |B| − |A ∩ B|.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0 of the exact value and includes records.

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Multiobjective Decisions applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Communicate multiobjective decisions in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
